edge.target: Jetson Orin Nano: SM_87, 8GB unified, 40 TOPS, TensorRT 8.x
edge.memory_budget: Hermes-3-8B Q4_K_M: ~4.9GB | LeWM+proj TRT: ~0.3GB | KV cache: ~0.5GB | OS: ~1.0GB | TOTAL: ~6.7GB

rules.rule: Static shapes only — no dynamic axes for TensorRT compatibility
ONNX export path must be written at design time, never retrofitted
Profile with torch.profiler before TensorRT export to find bottlenecks
Selective decoding: trigger LLM only when JEPA semantic variance exceeds threshold (~3x speedup)
FP16 for LeWM/projection, Q4_K_M GGUF for Hermes via llama.cpp
